problem id: 573eaca1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01111111 -> 11001111
  01110010 -> 10001110
  11111111 -> 11011111
  00101001 -> 01000101
  01110001 -> 01001110
  01000110 -> 10001000
  01101110 -> 10001101
  01101111 -> 11001101

query: 11110001
predicted answer: 01011110
